calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Assets As Trust Property
Off Calendar Dec-26-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Maureen Scully McFadden for petitioner Sharon Reardon (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Petition for Order Confirming Assets as Trust Property.

Ms. McFadden stated she had reviewed the notes sent by the Probate Examiner and requested leave to submit a declaration to address the noted deficiencies, with the intent that the Court take the matter under submission upon receipt of the declaration.

The Court indicated that if the declaration were submitted promptly, it could review the filing and issue an order without the need for further hearing. The Court directed Ms. McFadden to submit the declaration by the end of the week, or no later than the following Monday.

The Court specified that the declaration should include a complete copy of the trust instrument, as the copy previously provided only included the odd page numbers. Ms. McFadden stated she would address all issues raised in the examiner's notes.

Following discussion, the Court took the matter under submission, pending receipt of the supporting declaration.

Judge: Bradford J. DeMeo (visiting); Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
